_meta.name: real_curated_holdout
_meta.purpose: HELD-OUT validation set — 28 real sessions NOT used to tune the prompt. Confirms the best prompt (loop/best) generalizes rather than overfitting the 49-session tuning set. Same labeling rule and live open board as real_curated.json.
_meta.focus: Heavy non-task (27/28) with many NON-BOARD-KEY traps (model-favoured KAN-64/67/135/142/203/240, cross-project work) — the exact 'looks like a task but is untracked' failure mode.

labels.reasoning: Claude Code implementing CLASSIFY_PLAN_ONLY_CANDIDATES (plan-only candidate selection for the classifier). Directly matches KAN-239 'Pass confirmed daily plan to the session-task classifier'.
labels.design_note: The one clean open-board task — distinct from the plan UI build (untracked), this is the actual classifier hand-off.

labels.reasoning: Editing an OpenObserve dashboard JSON (the classifier-debug viz fields). Building a debug dashboard isn't cleanly any open ticket's scope; ambiguous between observability/audit tickets.
labels.design_note: DECOY: classifier-debug dashboard config edit; topically pulls KAN-231/241.

labels.reasoning: Chrome viewing GitHub Actions workflow-runs page. Monitoring CI, not producing a ticket.
Chrome viewing the Meridian /today dashboard (own product's time-breakdown, KAN-241 tile). Reviewing a dashboard, not doing the ticket.
Claude Code committing + opening PR #265 'fix(dev): suppress update banner in dev mode'. Real coding, but no open ticket covers it.
labels.design_note: Untracked: genuine fix with no candidate ticket.

labels.reasoning: Claude Code debugging Jira OAuth token-path priority in dev mode. Real debugging, no open ticket covers it.
Claude Code editing the Tauri tray poll.rs (connected/disconnected indicator). Tray UI work, no open ticket.
Chrome viewing the Meridian /worklogs review page (worklog drafts, KAN-142 tags). Reviewing the worklog UI, not producing a ticket.
labels.design_note: DECOY: KAN-142 worklog drafts on screen (KAN-142 not even open).

labels.reasoning: Chrome viewing the Meridian /tasks page (task list: KAN-135/67/64/142...). Reviewing the board, not doing a ticket.
labels.design_note: DECOY: wall of ticket keys (mostly non-board) on the tasks page.

labels.reasoning: Google Meet call with a DIFFERENT project's board on screen (Fus_# tickets / another company). Meeting on non-Meridian work; no open KAN ticket.
Claude Code task 'Research Trello and Asana integrations with OAuth' (MLX logs on a teammate's machine in view). Integration research; no open ticket for Trello/Asana.
Claude Code finishing the Trello OAuth integration (tauri menu, jira.rs/flow.rs). Real coding, but no Trello/integration ticket is open.
labels.design_note: DECOY: model forced KAN-67 (non-board). Real integration coding.

labels.reasoning: Chrome viewing the GitHub open-PR list. Reviewing PRs, not producing a ticket.
Claude Code authoring hackathon presentation slide prompts (Microsoft AI hackathon deck about Meridian). Real authoring, but no open ticket covers hackathon slides.
Claude Code fixing SSH auth for a DIFFERENT repo (wisevion/wiseshift_ui, 'Wisechain'). Different project, no Meridian ticket.

Claude Code design discussion: should sessions be classified-then-aggregated or summarised-first (classify→worklog pipeline architecture). Exploratory design/mapping, not hands-on production of a ticket.
labels.design_note: DECOY: classifier-pipeline topic pulls KAN-231; but it's architecture brainstorming, not production. Genuinely borderline.

labels.reasoning: Terminal running meridian status/restart/tasks-sync. Devops/ops actions, no specific ticket.
Terminal running the screenpipe/daemon install (curl bootstrap, launchd bootstrap). Setup/install, no ticket.
Terminal running 'meridian doctor' health diagnostics. Diagnostic check, no specific ticket.
Terminal cargo-watch daemon startup logs (dev-environment boot). Devops startup, no ticket.
labels.design_note: Untracked devops startup. Model forced KAN-240 (non-board).

Chrome browsing luma.com Bengaluru developer-meetup events. Personal/community browsing.
